caribbean.headline: Caribbean Seas Remain Calm
caribbean.paragraph: Nassau is experiencing light winds of 14 kt with wave heights of 3.1 ft and an 86% chance of rain, while Martinique has winds of 11 kt. I expect these conditions to persist with no significant threats to marine operations in the region, given the relatively low wind speeds and wave heights.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Increase
mediterranean.paragraph: Haifa is experiencing west-northwest swells with wave heights reaching 10.5 ft and winds up to 20 kt, while Mykonos is seeing winds of 25 kt. I expect an 80% chance of rain in these areas, with Haifa being the top impact port in the Eastern Mediterranean today.
